subcodes.first_line: We have revealed the clear proofs and unveiled that which lay hidden in the Book. Verily, We have spoken, and caused all things to speak forth in remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا بینا البینات و اظهرنا ما هو المستور فی الکتاب قد نطقنا و انطقنا الأشیاء بذکر الله
